MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Apr-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Danielle A. Hinton, Esq. of Ogletree Deakins, Tel. 415.536.3403, for defendant and moving party;
Li Ping Huang, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested by either party. RESPONDENT ANDRE-BOUDIN BAKERIES, INC'S Motion For Attorney Fees And Expenses is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: A. James Robertson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: LI PING HUANG, PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER, 415.689.0012; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT ANDRE-BOUDIN BAKERIES, INC'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is granted, with 10 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
